ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company posting the job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job location */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the job */,
  "stipend" TEXT /* Stipend offered for the job */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the job posting */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the job posting expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job posting (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_job_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_type_id") REFERENCES job_types ("job_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_types" (
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "job_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the job type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_seekers" (
  "job_seeker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job seeker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the job seeker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the job seeker */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the job seeker */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Resume of the job seeker */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the job seeker */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the job seeker */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills of the job seeker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_seeker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being applied for */,
  "job_seeker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job seeker applying for the job */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Cover letter of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_job_seeker_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_seeker_id") REFERENCES job_seekers ("job_seeker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company making the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "invoice" TEXT /* Invoice number of the payment */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Details of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the payment plan */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features of the payment plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription_history" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company subscribing to a plan */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment plan subscribed to */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription ends */,
  "auto_renewal" INTEGER /* Whether the subscription is set to auto-renew */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription was cancelled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_history_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES payment_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_history_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the admin user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the admin user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
